name: files
description: - **Express.js** — REST API - **PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM** — Database & migrations - **WebSockets (ws)** — Real-time signaling - **Redis (ioredis)** — Pub/Sub backplane for multi-server scaling - **Arcjet** — Rate limiting, bot protection, shield - **WebRTC** — P2P file transfer (signaled via WS, no server relay)
